def negative_state_changing_endpoint_missing_csrf_protection():
    rule_id = "state_changing_endpoint_missing_csrf_protection"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "State-changing POST/PUT/DELETE endpoint lacks CSRF token validation or SameSite enforcement."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
